run_summary.summary: One new deal today — Bedsure, via their agency Make Wonder MCN (contact: Iris). Iris reached out on April 10th with a paid collab offer: 1 IG Reel + 90-day paid ad usage rights + brand tag + 2-week link in bio, in exchange for cash + a complimentary sheet set. Liz replied on April 13th with a $4,500 bundle quote ($2,500 reel + $1,000/30 days usage × 3) and CC'd Kenny. Iris hasn't responded in 7 days, and Liz followed up again this morning. Deal is in negotiation, waiting on brand.

suggestions.message: Liz sent her $4,500 quote on April 13th and followed up this morning (April 20th) — still nothing from Iris at Make Wonder MCN. That's 7 days of silence. If no response by Friday April 25th, might be worth one final note before moving on. The rate is solid and the fit seems good — worth a gentle push.

deals.next_action: Wait for Iris's response on $4,500 quote; follow up if no reply by Apr 25
deals.notes:
[Apr 20]: Liz followed up to confirm Iris received her Apr 13 reply. Still no response from brand.

[Apr 13]: Liz quoted $4,500 bundle — 1 IG Reel ($2,500) + 90-day paid ad usage ($1,000/30 days) + 14-day link in bio. CC'd Kenny. Noted openness to negotiate.

[Apr 10]: Iris from Make Wonder MCN (Bedsure's agency) reached out with paid collab offer — 1 IG Reel + 90-day paid ad usage rights + brand tag + 2-week link in bio, plus complimentary Bedsure sheet set. Bedsure is a premium home essentials brand (bamboo sheet sets).
deals.activity_note: Apr 20: Brandi created deal — Bedsure inbound via Make Wonder MCN (Iris). Liz quoted $4,500 bundle on Apr 13; followed up today with no brand response yet.
